creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I cannot reproduce this.  I believe you are doing something wrong.  When you  
issued ``make'' you went right into the ""configure" phase.  Where was the  
checksum, depends, extract, and patch phases.  I can compile this port just 
fine on my 3.3 box, and the FreeBSD Package build cluster builds it fine 
also.
